purpose: Execution/run history for ROCm sparse probe attempts. Solver closure evidence stays in mgt_rocm_sparse_solver_probe.json.

notes: SAAMG candidates were moved behind MGT_ROCALUTION_ENABLE_SAAMG_SWEEP=1 after a prior GPU memory fault.
The rerun reached ROCm execution but did not complete within the official 420s timeout.
The orphaned Python and rocALUTION child processes were terminated before restoration.
